# ScriptedFantasy

> Personal archive of Lukas Amacher.

## About

Recently founded Contxt.art to bring conversational intelligence to exhibitions worldwide — AI-native tooling for museums, galleries, and exhibitors.

Previously co-founding artistic director at 1OF1, a globally active art collection and collaborative studio supporting digital native artists and forward-thinking art institutions (2022–2024). Built a 40M USD collection. Collaborated with MoMA NYC, M+ Hong Kong, Serpentine Galleries London, Castello di Rivoli, Crystal Bridges. Projects with Beeple, Refik Anadol, Holly Herndon & Mat Dryhurst, Urs Fischer, Sasha Stiles.

Before that, co-founded Projekt Interim (2011–2019), Switzerland's largest provider of temporary real estate. 3000 tenants in 150 properties.

Also makes and releases music under the name Ethimm (since 2012).

## Companies

- **Contxt** (2025–present) — https://contxt.art — Conversational intelligence for exhibitions worldwide.
- **1OF1** (2022–2024) — Co-founding artistic and managing director. 40M USD art collection. MoMA, M+, Serpentine, Castello di Rivoli, Crystal Bridges.
- **Projekt Interim** (2011–2019) — Switzerland's largest temporary real-estate provider. 3000 tenants, 150 properties.

## Projects

- **tarotpepe** (2025) — Pepe-themed tarot cards and AI chatbot on eliza framework. Jungian psycho-analytics, meme-theory, market philosophy.
- **Ethimm** (2012–present) — Writer, singer, performer, producer. Labels: Light of other Days, Subject to Restriction Discs, No Sense Necessary.

## Selected Curating, Writing and Public Speaking

- **Sam Spratt — The Monument Game** (2024) — Curated debut exhibition at Docks Cantiere Cucchini in Venice, during the Venice Biennale. Press: Artnews, Artribune, Coolhunting, Artframe, Outland.
- **Cartography of the Soul** (2023) — Digital art auction with Christie's for MAPS. 30+ works by Holly Herndon & Mat Dryhurst, Maya Man, Dustin Yellin, Sam Spratt, Nadya Tolokonnikova. Press: Artnet, NFTnow.
- **Tishan Hsu — Organic Technology** (2024) — Interview published in Twin Magazine. Topics: technology and the body, AI, visual syntax, the metaverse.
- **State of AI** (2024) — Panel with Holly Herndon, Refik Anadol, Sasha Stiles. 1OF1 Summer Jam, Art Basel.
- **The Art Availability Layer** (2024) — Essay for 1OF1 Editorial. Art archiving on-chain, the lindy effect, artist-centric design.
- **The Future of the Digital Art Business** (2024) — Panel at Art Business Conference Dubai.
- **Image as Process** (2023) — Essay for 1OF1 Editorial. Infinite artworks, Beeple's HUMAN ONE vs. Francis Bacon, generative technology.
- **Predictive Institutions** (2023) — Presentation at Global Art Forum Dubai.
- **Present Digital** (2023) — Panel moderation at Global Art Forum Dubai.
- **Matt McClune** (2013) — Curated solo presentation at Galerie Mark Mueller, Zurich.
